title: Add Robust Error Handling
description: Harden a function or module against failure with deliberate error handling.
content:
Review the code below and add robust error handling:

```
{{code}}
```

For each failure mode, decide deliberately: validate-and-reject, retry, fall back, or propagate. Then:
- Validate inputs at the boundary; fail fast with actionable messages.
- Never swallow errors silently — log or rethrow with context.
- Distinguish expected failures (return/throw typed errors) from bugs (let them surface).
- Keep the happy path readable; don't drown it in try/catch.

Show the revised code and a one-line rationale per change.
